titleStmt.title: SII 5.1190: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1190. (A.R. No. 309 of 1896). ON THE SAME PILLAR, NORTH FACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē śṛtisiṁdhunētradharaṇīsaṁkhyānvi
tē mā¨rggakē māsē maṁggaḷaśuklapakṣadipasē Ēkādaśīsaṁ
yutē . vārē kāvyadinē nṛśiṁhyanṛpatēra(ṁ)¨rddhāṁgalakṣmī
mudā gaṁggāṁbā svamanōradhasya subhagā sidyai pradātkacca pē .
dhūpē raupyamayēvasānasamayē kiṁcit catasraṁ dvayaṁ kṣīra 1
sa¨rppiyutaṁ sama¨rppitumalaṁ siddhyai pradādviṁśatiṁ . dhēnūnāṁ daśa
paṁca vikrayavidhādatvātha niṣkāḥ punaḥ paṁcaitē daśamalla
sammitamayaṁ ni(ṁ)tyaṁ ca bhaktyā harēḥ . dhūpakālē ca kū¨rmmasya
divyakōladharau dvijau . śrīpādalu reṁḍu padmamoggala mā 1 padmavu
vulu re 2 pahiḍi movaliṟēkulu 8 pahiḍi racanagarayalu
4 . vijanaṁ sva¨rṇadaṁḍaṁ ca dhāraṇē koṭṭināmata . jaganādhunki
tūmeṁḍu prasādamunnu Appamu 1 viḍiyamu 1 jītamu gaṁḍamā 1
villapillakōṭiki tūmeṁḍu prasādamu Appamu 1 viḍiyamu 1 jī
tamu gaṁḍamā 1 jiyyagāri Anaṁtunki prasādamu tu 1 Appa
mu 1 viḍiyamu 1 jītamu gaṁḍama 1 Īmūvurakunnu Iṁ
tavaṭu śrībhaṁḍāramaṁdu mallalu mu 36 māḍalu peṭi
nnāru Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamugānu celliṁpagalāru .
Digital edition of SII 5.1190 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
